workflows.name: Agent Suggestions
workflows.description: Suggests agentic workflows and improvements for the repository based on analysis of current setup.

workflows.name: Automated Documentation
workflows.description: Analyzes documentation for gaps, outdated content, and inconsistencies; creates issues and PRs to improve docs.

workflows.name: Automerge
workflows.description: Enables auto-merge for approved dependency-update PRs that meet merge-ready criteria.

workflows.name: Dependency Review
workflows.description: Analyzes dependency-update PRs from bots, applies merge-ready labels when criteria are met.

workflows.name: Resource Not Accessible Detector
workflows.description: Detects 'Resource not accessible by integration' occurrences in workflow logs and creates triage issues.

workflows.name: Resource Not Accessible Triage
workflows.description: Triages newly opened issues for the Resource Not Accessible by Integration problem class.

workflows.name: Resource Not Accessible Fixer
workflows.description: Executes fixes for issues labeled ready to fix in the Resource Not Accessible by Integration flow.
